---
title: Governance Decisions Required
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.17.3
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

## Metadata placement standards

Clear standards are needed for where metadata lives within the Common Metadata Repository (CMR) metadata models.

### Collection-level metadata

*(Define what metadata belongs at the collection level and how it should be structured.)*

### Granule-level metadata

*(Define what metadata belongs at the granule level and how it relates to collection-level metadata.)*

## Versioning and update policies for virtual layers

Virtual stores are living artifacts that will need to be updated as source data is corrected, reprocessed, or extended. Policies are needed to govern:

- When and how virtual store versions are incremented
- How consumers are notified of updates
- How to handle backward compatibility

*(Versioning policies to be defined.)*

## Ownership and stewardship of virtual store assets

*(Define which teams or DAACs are responsible for creating, maintaining, and deprecating virtual store assets for each dataset type.)*
